/X JUDGE FLEMING APPEARS VIA ZOOM/TWS/CH3 ISS CPROB PROB 2 Y PJ 2D/CTS 2/: THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASEFINE OF $145 PLUS $434 IN ASSESSMENTS FOR AFINE AMOUNT OF $579,/VF2:150/FOP1: 3 MONTH/LCHEM/LVAL/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BYREFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/REMA/VD:08-19-20/CTORD:$40 COA, $30ICNA, AND $10 CITE FEE ARE WAIVED/
